🗂️  Byreal MCP Tool Catalog (31 tools)

── Pools ──
  byreal_list_pools
    List Byreal CLMM pools sorted by TVL, volume, fees, or APR.
    Params: sortField, sortType, page, pageSize
  byreal_pool_info
    Get detailed info for specific pool(s) by address (up to 10 at once).
    Params: poolIds: string[]
  byreal_pool_live_price
    Get live price for a token pair via Byreal Router swap quote.
    Params: inputMint, outputMint
  byreal_pool_analyze
    Comprehensive pool analysis: volatility, range APR estimates, in-range likelihood, risk factors, and investment projection. Best tool for deciding LP price bounds.
    Params: poolAddress, amountUsd (default 1000), ranges (default "1,2,3,5,8,10,15,20,35,50")

── Positions ──
  byreal_list_positions
    List all CLMM liquidity positions for a wallet. Shows pair, PnL, earned fees, deposit, age, status.
    Params: walletAddress, page, pageSize
  byreal_calculate_apr
    Estimate APR for a hypothetical position on a pool.
    Params: poolAddress, depositUsd
  byreal_position_analyze
    Analyze an existing CLMM position: performance, range health, pool context, unclaimed fees.
    Params: walletAddress, nftMint

── Swap ──
  byreal_swap_quote
    Get a live swap quote (no wallet). Returns expected output, price impact, min received, pools used.
    Params: inputMint, outputMint, amount (raw units), slippageBps
  byreal_swap_execute
    Execute a swap on Byreal. Requires wallet configured. Signs and sends transaction.
    Params: inputMint, outputMint, amount (raw units), slippageBps
  byreal_easy_swap
    Human-friendly swap with dry-run support. Auto-resolves symbols, converts amounts. Includes error recovery suggestions.
    Params: fromToken (symbol or mint), toToken (symbol or mint), amount (e.g. "1.5"), slippageBps, dryRun (preview only)

── Tokens ──
  byreal_list_tokens
    List known tokens on Byreal with prices.
    Params: page, pageSize, sortField, sortType
  byreal_token_info
    Get info for a specific token by mint address.
    Params: mint

── Market ──
  byreal_market_overview
    Get global Byreal market overview: total TVL, volume, top pools.
    Params: (none)
  byreal_pool_klines
    Get OHLCV kline (candlestick) data for a pool.
    Params: poolAddress, interval (1m/5m/15m/1h/4h/1d), limit
  byreal_dynamic_fee
    Get current dynamic fee rates for Byreal pools.
    Params: (none)

── Liquidity ──
  byreal_open_position
    Open a new CLMM LP position. Supports amountUsd for auto token split based on price range. Returns unsigned tx.
    Params: poolAddress, priceLower, priceUpper, baseToken, baseAmount OR amountUsd (auto-split), userAddress, slippage
  byreal_close_position
    Close a CLMM position (remove all liquidity). Returns unsigned tx.
    Params: nftMint, userAddress, slippage, closePosition
  byreal_add_liquidity
    Add liquidity to an existing position or create a new one. Requires wallet.
    Params: poolAddress, tokenAAmount, tokenBAmount, priceLower, priceUpper, slippageBps
  byreal_remove_liquidity
    Remove liquidity from a position (partial or full). Requires wallet.
    Params: nftMint, percent (0-100), slippageBps
  byreal_collect_fees
    Collect unclaimed fees from a position. Requires wallet.
    Params: nftMint

── CopyFarmer ──
  byreal_top_farmers
    List top liquidity farmers on Byreal by earnings.
    Params: page, pageSize, poolAddress (optional)
  byreal_top_positions
    List top-performing positions in a pool for copy trading. Includes inRange status (whether earning fees). Use to discover copy targets.
    Params: poolAddress (required), page, pageSize, sortField (liquidity|apr|earned|pnl|copies|bonus|closeTime), sortType, status (0=open, 1=closed)
  byreal_copy_position
    Copy an existing position with same price range. Records referral on-chain for copy bonus. Supports amountUsd for auto token split.
    Params: positionAddress, userAddress, baseToken (A|B), baseAmount OR amountUsd (auto-split), slippage
  byreal_copyfarmer_overview
    Get CopyFarmer program global stats — total copies, followers, aggregate performance.
    Params: (none)
  byreal_farmer_positions
    Get positions of a specific farmer by wallet address.
    Params: walletAddress, page, pageSize

── Orders ──
  byreal_list_orders
    List limit orders for a wallet.
    Params: walletAddress, page, pageSize
  byreal_create_order
    Create a limit order. Requires wallet.
    Params: inputMint, outputMint, inputAmount, outputAmount, expireAt
  byreal_cancel_order
    Cancel a limit order. Requires wallet.
    Params: orderId

── Wallet ──
  byreal_wallet_balance
    Check SOL and token balances for a wallet.
    Params: walletAddress
  byreal_wallet_status
    Check if a wallet keypair is configured in the MCP server.
    Params: (none)

── Discovery ──
  byreal_catalog
    List all available Byreal MCP tools with descriptions and parameters. Use for agent discovery.
    Params: search (optional keyword)
